abbreviations.UC: Steel Column Core Filled Reinforced Hollow Section (as part of symbol designation)
abbreviations.UCC: Steel Column Core Filled Reinforced Hollow Section
abbreviations.SCCF: Steel Column Core Filled Reinforced Hollow Section

notes: Beam naming convention: UB[size][suffix] #[Shear Stud Type] [Fire Rating] [Grade]. Example: UB15a # ST1 FR G350L. Symbols used in beam callouts: horizontal line with arrow (beam oriented horizontally), square with diagonal line (shear stud type), square with diagonal line and 'FR' (fire rated member), square with diagonal line and 'G' (grade if different from schedule). Required precamber is indicated by '+[value]Δ' midspan, UNO by location of symbol. FB denotes Fly Bracing location. Grade 'S' is specified for turnbuckles used in rod bracing. Splice location is indicated by '==' symbol.; Beam callouts on plan follow the convention: [Beam Type and Size] # [Shear Stud Type] [Fire Rating] [Grade if different from schedule]. Example: UB15a # ST1 FR G350L.
